maleNarrator.voiceTextEn: I am the leader of the team, the one they call 'Captain'.
maleNarrator.subtitleZh: 我是队长，大家都叫我‘队长’

maleNarrator.voiceTextEn: He darts across the court, executing a perfect layup.
maleNarrator.subtitleZh: 他在球场上飞奔，完成了一个完美的上篮

femaleSystem.subtitleZh: 手柄已连接，震动已开启
